r46_prediction_test: P2 (>10 NEG → MODIFIER no flip) — base zone alignment ALIGNED. F2 (|BASE|>10 flips) requires SFT measurement; untested.
raw10_caveat: Boundary case at threshold edge (10.75 vs threshold ~10). Threshold sensitivity ±2 untested. Chinese pretrain effect not isolated.
top_var_note: Yi-6B activations have ~1000× larger top-variance than Phi-3-mini / DeepSeek (550 vs 0.84 / 2.95) — different activation scale regime; unrelated to R46 sign but architecturally notable.
